category_sources: source_facts.description says reshape is a zero-downtime schema migration tool for Postgres.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo is the official GitHub repository, whose README is the primary documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/fabianlindfors/reshape, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists reshape and current_curation.tags includes cli.
